description: Comparative corpus evidence module covering multiple historical cases under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice (American Revolution, Napoleon, Lincoln, Hitler): a multi-case stratified corpus with manifest-driven pipeline and cross-case synthesis research site.
maintainerNotes: American Revolution is confirmed as american-revolution with a minimal PPW case folder and reference-only subset link. Napoleon remains a proposed PPW case ID in data/corpora/sacrifice-law-comparative-41/cases.json; create or approve that folder before importing its subset. Rights vary by era; pre-1928 texts are generally public domain, Nazi-era translations and apparatus require review. Corpus import metadata is represented in Milestone 17; no full texts or promoted support ratings are imported.
